ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_algorithms" (
  "ga_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic algorithm instance */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters and configurations used for the genetic algorithm */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the genetic algorithm run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the genetic algorithm run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the genetic algorithm */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of genetic algorithm */,
  "objective_function" TEXT /* Objective function used in the genetic algorithm */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the genetic algorithm instance */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Last user who modified the genetic algorithm instance */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the genetic algorithm instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ga_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ga_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic algorithm being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the genetic algorithm */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the genetic algorithm was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_ga_id FOREIGN KEY ("ga_id") REFERENCES genetic_algorithms ("ga_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "ga_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic algorithm instance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups with whom the report is shared */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_ga_id FOREIGN KEY ("ga_id") REFERENCES genetic_algorithms ("ga_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Users or groups with whom the visualization is shared */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_criteria" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter criteria */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter criteria */,
  "filter_values" TEXT /* Values for the filter criteria */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the filter criteria */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the filter criteria were created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_criteria_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sort_criteria" (
  "sort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sort criteria */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sort */,
  "sort_name" TEXT /* Name of the sort criteria */,
  "sort_order" TEXT /* Order of the sort (e.g., ascending, descending) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the sort criteria */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sort criteria were created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sort_criteria_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
